ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interrupts" (
  "interrupt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interrupt or exception event */,
  "exception_number" INTEGER /* Exception number associated with the event */,
  "vector_offset" TEXT /* Vector offset of the interrupt or exception */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function or module that generated the interrupt or exception */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flags associated with the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the system at the time of the event (e.g., running, halted, reset) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the interrupt */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the interrupt */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the interrupt has been resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interrupt was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the resolution process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interrupt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interrupts_function_name FOREIGN KEY ("function_name") REFERENCES functions ("function_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interrupts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interrupts_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES system_status ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function or module */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function or module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function or module */,
  "module_type" TEXT /* Type of the module (e.g., communication, display, input/output) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the function or module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Criticality level of the flag (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_required" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the flag requires immediate resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interrupt_flag_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "interrupt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interrupt or exception event */,
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flag associated with the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interrupt_flag_mapping_flag_id FOREIGN KEY ("flag_id") REFERENCES flags ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interrupt_flag_mapping_interrupt_id FOREIGN KEY ("interrupt_id") REFERENCES interrupts ("interrupt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the log */,
  "interrupt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interrupt or exception event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the log was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_interrupt_id FOREIGN KEY ("interrupt_id") REFERENCES interrupts ("interrupt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the system status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system status */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action for the system status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last firmware update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_interrupt_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "interrupt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interrupt or exception event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_interrupt_mapping_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_interrupt_mapping_interrupt_id FOREIGN KEY ("interrupt_id") REFERENCES interrupts ("interrupt_id")
)
